title: Heatwave Warning Issued for Andhra Pradesh - The Hans India
full_text:
Heatwave Warning Issued for Andhra Pradesh
The temperature in Andhra Pradesh has soared to scorching levels, causing people to hesitate before venturing outdoors.
In response, the Meteorological Department has issued warnings of an impending heatwave.
The department indicated that several districts, including Prakasam, Kurnool, and Kadapa, are likely to experience extremely high temperatures today.
